text:
On a warm summer evening, a group of friends gathers at Tom's backyard barbecue. They gather around a firepit as bowls of crispy fried fries are passed around. The laughter is infectious. Everyone talks about old times and plans for the weekend. They all love that crazy little cat that Tom says hangs out near the bird feeder.

Then Tom tells a story. Once upon a time, there was an old lady who lived all alone. She loved collecting old porcelain dolls. One day, while she was cleaning out her attic, she stumbled upon a trove of antique dolls. Each one was unique, adorned with intricate patterns. She bought them all, planning to display them someday.

But then something amazing happened. Every doll she displayed would begin to tell a story about its past life. Some had stories of wandering adventures, others of lonely adoptions into different families. There was even one that seemed to speak in riddles.
